name: income-calculator
title: Income Calculator
description: Split a business payment into taxes, owner, and operating expenses.
author: travis

commands.name: calculate-income
commands.title: Calculate Income
commands.subtitle: Income Calculator
commands.description: Enter a payment amount and get the tax / owner / operating breakdown.

preferences.name: taxRate
preferences.title: Tax Rate (%)
preferences.description: Percentage of the payment set aside for taxes.

preferences.name: ownerRate
preferences.title: Owner Rate (%)
preferences.description: Percentage of the payment that goes to the owner.

preferences.name: opexRate
preferences.title: Operating Expenses Rate (%)
preferences.description: Percentage of the payment kept for operating expenses.
